Bill H.9999 SECTION 1. Notwithstanding any general or special law to the contrary, the town of Testville may transfer to the Commonwealth certain parcels of land for highway purposes. SECTION 2. As consideration, the Commonwealth shall compensate the town in an amount not less than 110 percent of the fair market value of the transferred lands. The information contained in this website is for general information purposes only. The General Court provides this information as a public service and while we endeavor to keep the data accurate and current to the best of our ability, we make no representations or warranties of any kind.
